caption: A person's hand holds up a sports trading card featuring Edgar Martinez in a Seattle Mariners uniform, which includes an autograph and the text "EDGAR MARTINEZ". The card is displayed against a background featuring a table with a palm tree design and a small inset video of a man wearing a dark blue t-shirt. The logos "JASPYS" and "CASEBREAKS.COM" are visible on the screen. In the transition between scenes, the person moves the card away from the camera and places it into a protective plastic sleeve, which is then set atop a stack of other white card sleeves. Throughout the sequence, the background remains consistent, showing a desk area with equipment and a white shelving unit. The man in the inset video remains seated, looking toward the camera while the card is being handled.
